languages.text: {n}Вражескиий натиск ослаб. Ксеносы все еще оказывают вялое сопротивление, но основные силы их охранной эскадры уничтожены безвозвратно, благодаря доблести и мастерству имперских пилотов. В этом бою победа за вами.{/n}

{n}The enemy's onslaught has abated. The xenos continue to offer feeble opposition, but the main forces of their guard squadron have been irrevocably destroyed thanks to the valour and skill of the pilots of the Imperium. In this battle, victory is yours.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вражескиий натиск ослаб. Ксеносы все еще оказывают вялое сопротивление, но основные силы их охранной эскадры уничтожены безвозвратно, благодаря доблести и мастерству имперских пилотов. В этом бою победа за вами.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The enemy's onslaught has abated. The xenos continue to offer feeble opposition, but the main forces of their guard squadron have been irrevocably destroyed thanks to the valour and skill of the pilots of the Imperium. In this battle, victory is yours.{/n}

{n}The enemy's onslaught has abated. The xenos continue to offer feeble opposition, but the main forces of their guard squadron have been irrevocably destroyed thanks to the valour and skill of the pilots of the Imperium. In this battle, victory is yours.{/n}

{n}The enemy fleet has been crushed and driven back. The xenos continue to offer feeble opposition, but the main forces of their fleet have been irrevocably destroyed thanks to the valour and skill of the Imperium pilots. In this battle, victory is yours.{/n}

{n}The enemy's onslaught has abated. The xenos continue to offer feeble opposition, but the main forces of their guard squadron have been irrevocably destroyed thanks to the valour and skill of the pilots of the Imperium. In this battle, victory is yours.{/n}

{n}The enemy's onslaught has abated. The xenos continue to offer feeble opposition, but the main forces of their guard squadron have been irrevocably destroyed thanks to the valour and skill of the pilots of the Imperium. In this battle, victory is yours.{/n}

languages.text: {n}敵艦隊は壊滅し、後退しました。異星人は抵抗を続けていますが、帝国のパイロットの勇気と腕により、彼らの艦隊の主力部隊は完全に壊滅しました。この戦いは、貴方の勝利です。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The enemy fleet has been crushed and driven back. The xenos continue to offer feeble opposition, but the main forces of their fleet have been irrevocably destroyed thanks to the valour and skill of the Imperium pilots. In this battle, victory is yours.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 敵艦隊は壊滅し、後退しました。異星人は抵抗を続けていますが、帝国のパイロットの勇気と腕により、彼らの艦隊の主力部隊は完全に壊滅しました。この戦いは、貴方の勝利です。

languages.text: {n}El asalto del enemigo empieza a debilitarse. Los xenos siguen resistiéndose, pero sus fuerzas defensivas principales han sido aniquiladas gracias al valor y la habilidad de los pilotos del Imperium. En esta batalla, la victoria te pertenece.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The enemy's onslaught has abated. The xenos continue to offer feeble opposition, but the main forces of their guard squadron have been irrevocably destroyed thanks to the valour and skill of the pilots of the Imperium. In this battle, victory is yours.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El asalto del enemigo empieza a debilitarse. Los xenos siguen resistiéndose, pero sus fuerzas defensivas principales han sido aniquiladas gracias al valor y la habilidad de los pilotos del Imperium. En esta batalla, la victoria te pertenece.{/n}

languages.text: {n}敌方进攻已被平息。虽有零星异形仍在负隅顽抗，但多亏了帝国飞行员的神勇与精湛技艺，敌军护卫中队的主力已彻底覆灭。此役，胜利属于你。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The enemy's onslaught has abated. The xenos continue to offer feeble opposition, but the main forces of their guard squadron have been irrevocably destroyed thanks to the valour and skill of the pilots of the Imperium. In this battle, victory is yours.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}敌方进攻已被平息。虽有零星异形仍在负隅顽抗，但多亏了帝国飞行员的神勇与精湛技艺，敌军护卫中队的主力已彻底覆灭。此役，胜利属于你。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Ansturm des Feindes wurde abgewehrt. Die Xenos leisten noch immer schwachen Widerstand, aber die Hauptstreitmacht ihres Wachgeschwaders wurde dank der Tapferkeit und Kompetenz der Piloten des Imperiums unwiederbringlich zerstört. Du hast diese Schlacht gewonnen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The enemy's onslaught has abated. The xenos continue to offer feeble opposition, but the main forces of their guard squadron have been irrevocably destroyed thanks to the valour and skill of the pilots of the Imperium. In this battle, victory is yours.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Ansturm des Feindes wurde abgewehrt. Die Xenos leisten noch immer schwachen Widerstand, aber die Hauptstreitmacht ihres Wachgeschwaders wurde dank der Tapferkeit und Kompetenz der Piloten des Imperiums unwiederbringlich zerstört. Du hast diese Schlacht gewonnen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Düşmanın saldırısı duruldu. Zenolar cılız bir direniş göstermeye devam ediyor ancak koruma eskadralarının ana kuvvetleri, İmparatorluk pilotlarının asil cesareti ve becerisi sayesinde geri döndürülemez bir şekilde yok edildi. Bu savaşta zafer senin.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The enemy's onslaught has abated. The xenos continue to offer feeble opposition, but the main forces of their guard squadron have been irrevocably destroyed thanks to the valour and skill of the pilots of the Imperium. In this battle, victory is yours.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Düşmanın saldırısı duruldu. Zenolar cılız bir direniş göstermeye devam ediyor ancak koruma eskadralarının ana kuvvetleri, İmparatorluk pilotlarının asil cesareti ve becerisi sayesinde geri döndürülemez bir şekilde yok edildi. Bu savaşta zafer senin.{/n}

languages.text: {n}L'assaut ennemi a perdu en intensité. Les xénos continuent à opposer une faible résistance, mais le gros de leur escadron a été irrévocablement détruit, grâce à la vaillance et au talent des pilotes de l'Imperium. Vous remportez cette bataille.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The enemy's onslaught has abated. The xenos continue to offer feeble opposition, but the main forces of their guard squadron have been irrevocably destroyed thanks to the valour and skill of the pilots of the Imperium. In this battle, victory is yours.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}L'assaut ennemi a perdu en intensité. Les xénos continuent à opposer une faible résistance, mais le gros de leur escadron a été irrévocablement détruit, grâce à la vaillance et au talent des pilotes de l'Imperium. Vous remportez cette bataille.{/n}
